shipped.description: 18 GitHub Actions OIDC publish workflows (17 Python packages + 1 Vercel/Astro). DEPLOY.md 10-step playbook. Launch copy for semantic-pass-k, model-parity, cot-fidelity, context-trace.
Per-context-chunk causal AttributionScore for LLM outputs
Semantic consistency testing for AI agents — CI-gateable ConsistencyScore with 4 criticality tiers

semantic_pass_k.what_it_does: Finds pairs of semantically equivalent inputs that produce incompatible outputs. Consistency scoring with CI gate. Public leaderboard: GPT-4o contradicts itself 36% of the time.
semantic_pass_k.gap_preserved: contradish frames as contradiction detection (incompatible claims), not pass@k sampling API with criticality tiers. semantic-pass-k measures semantic equivalence across k runs of the SAME input, not cross-input contradiction.
semantic_pass_k.differentiator_update: Add public leaderboard to semantic-pass-k GitHub README (ConsistencyScore for Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro) — mirrors contradish's effective marketing hook
semantic_pass_k.urgency: CRITICAL — contradish is live with hosted paid tier. Deploy NOW.

model_parity.gap_preserved: model-equality-testing detects statistical model changes; no migration workflow, no gating, no YAML test suites. Stalled 18 months.

context_trace.gap_preserved: context-cite requires raw logit access — incompatible with hosted APIs. No new entrant in 10+ months. Gap confirmed clear.

overlap_warning.action: Differentiate in READMEs: prompt-lock is regression testing (snapshot-based), not contract enforcement. llm-contract focuses on behavioral invariants, not structural validation.

competitive_intelligence_live_scan.oidc_workflow_confirmed: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1 + id-token: write is the 2026 canonical standard. All 18 workflows created this cycle are correct.
competitive_intelligence_live_scan.show_hn_insight: Developer testing tools need a visual hook or benchmark to break 200 points. Add ConsistencyScore leaderboard table to semantic-pass-k README before HN launch. Timing: weekday morning US Eastern. No coordinated upvoting.
